utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required format has 7 items: destination; travel_dates; transportation (flight details with costs); accommodation (hotel selection with costs); activities (selected activities with costs); additional_services (any extra services with costs); total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes fields for: destination; travel_dates; transportation (with estimated total cost but no specific flight details like airline/flight numbers/times); accommodation (hotel, nights, per-night rate, total cost); activities (listed with individual costs and total); dining (not part of required format); additional_services (listed but no costs provided, only 'included'); total_budget (single approximate figure, not a detailed breakdown). Now assess full specification per item: - destination: present and specific → covered. - travel_dates: present and specific → covered. - transportation: has cost but lacks specific flight details; requirement asks for flight details with costs → not fully specified. - accommodation: hotel with nights, rate, total cost → covered. - activities: selected activities with costs and total → covered. - additional_services: requires 'any extra services with costs'; costs not provided → not fully specified. - total_budget: requires a complete cost breakdown; only an approximate total is given, not a breakdown summing components → not fully specified. Thus, covered items: destination, travel_dates, accommodation, activities = 4 out of 7.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We map each element from the final package to the exact matching items in the ground-truth. Destination: 'Prague, Czech Republic' matches 'Prague, Czech Republic' in destinations. Transportation: 'Economy Class flights on a budget airline' matches transportation.budget_airlines.Economy Class. Accommodation: 'Cityscape Hotel' matches accommodation.Cityscape Hotel. Activities: 'Rock Climbing Session' maps to activities.Rock Climbing; 'Scuba Diving Excursion' maps to activities.Scuba Diving Excursion. Dining: 'Special gluten-free dining experience' aligns best with restaurants.Gluten-Free Eatery. Additional services: 'Local transportation arrangements and one-time travel assistance included' — the only clearly corresponding rated service is 'Virtual Personal Assistant' under additional_hotel_services (one-time travel assistance). If mapping both general_services and additional_hotel_services variants, we choose the closer context to hotel/trip assistance; use additional_hotel_services.Virtual Personal Assistant. Items without exact matches (e.g., 'local transportation arrangements') have no direct rating entry and are omitted.

final_package_text:
{
  "destination": "Prague, Czech Republic",
  "travel_dates": "July 10–14, 2024",
  "transportation": "Economy Class flights on a budget airline at an estimated total cost of €180",
  "accommodation": "Cityscape Hotel – 4 nights at €150/night, totaling €600",
  "activities": "Rock Climbing Session (€50) and Scuba Diving Excursion (€100), total €150",
  "dining": "Special gluten-free dining experience for one meal at €40",
  "additional_services": "Local transportation arrangements and one-time travel assistance included",
  "total_budget": "Approximately €900"
}
